children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: For purposes of this subtitle, if a person makes a qualified disclaimer with respect to any interest in property, this subtitle shall apply with respect to such interest as if the interest had never been transferred to such person.

children.label: A
children.text: the day on which the transfer creating the interest in such person is made, or

children.label: B
children.text: the day on which such person attains age 21,
such person has not accepted the interest or any of its benefits, and

children.label: A
children.text: to the spouse of the decedent, or

children.label: B
children.text: to a person other than the person making the disclaimer.

children.heading: Disclaimer of undivided portion of interest
children.label: 1 Disclaimer of undivided portion of interest
children.text: A disclaimer with respect to an undivided portion of an interest which meets the requirements of the preceding sentence shall be treated as a qualified disclaimer of such portion of the interest.

children.heading: Powers
children.label: 2 Powers
children.text: A power with respect to property shall be treated as an interest in such property.

children.label: A
children.text: which meets requirements similar to the requirements of paragraphs (2) and (3) of subsection (b), and

children.label: B
children.text: which is to a person or persons who would have received the property had the transferor made a qualified disclaimer (within the meaning of subsection (b)),
